name: commercial-policy
description: > Commercial policy: the written governance framework that defines what commercial terms sales can offer, what triggers approval, and what's off-limits. Use when authoring or refreshing a company commercial-policy charter, defining discount / contract / payment / termination / liability policies, auditing existing deals for policy compliance, drafting commercial-policy training for sales, or generating a tailored policy for a new region or vertical. Sits above deal-desk (which enforces) and pric
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一套用于编写和更新企业商务政策的治理框架，明确销售在折扣、合同、付款、终止、责任等方面的权限边界和审批触发条件，适合制定政策章程、审计交易合规性，或为新地区、新行业定制专属规则。
